description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should have two jobs: build and build-alpine. The build job runs on ubuntu-latest with Node.js versions 18, 20, and 22, checks out the repository, installs dependencies with npm ci, and runs npm test. The build-alpine job runs on ubuntu-latest in an alpine container with the same Node.js versions, installs make, g++, and python3, checks out the repository, installs dependencies with npm ci, and runs npm test with --unsafe-perm.
